name: CSCS
description: All operatives hold valid CSCS cards, demonstrating competence and health & safety awareness for working on construction and infrastructure sites.

name: SMSTS
description: Site managers qualified under the CITB SMSTS programme, ensuring competent safety leadership on every project.

name: SSSTS
description: Site supervisors trained under the CITB SSSTS programme, maintaining operational safety standards across all works.

name: First Aid at Work
description: Qualified first aiders across all operational teams, ensuring immediate response capability on every site.

name: Chainsaw & Tree Work
description: NPTC-certified chainsaw operatives qualified in felling, cross-cutting, and aerial tree work operations.

name: PA1/PA6
description: PA1 (foundation) and PA6 (handheld applicators) certified operatives for professional herbicide application in vegetation management programmes.

name: NRSWA
fullName: New Roads and Street Works Act
description: NRSWA-qualified operatives and supervisors for compliant traffic-managed works on the public highway.

name: Water Safety Level 2
description: Teams trained and equipped for safe working in and around watercourses, including appropriate PPE and rescue equipment.

name: Plant Tickets
description: Certified plant operators for excavators, dumpers, and specialist machinery, enabling self-delivery of earthworks and site preparation.

name: Chapter 8
description: Chapter 8-compliant vehicles, signage, and equipment for safe working on or adjacent to the highway network.

name: CHAS
fullName: Contractors Health and Safety Assessment Scheme
description: CHAS-accredited, demonstrating compliance with core health and safety criteria recognised by major public and private sector clients.

name: Constructionline
description: Registered on Constructionline, the UK government's pre-qualification service, streamlining procurement for public sector clients.

name: SafeContractor
description: SafeContractor accredited, providing assurance of health and safety competence to clients across all sectors.
